title: utricularia vulgaris subsp. minor
intro: Utricularia vulgaris subsp. minor, commonly known as the common bladderwort or lesser bladderwort, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the genus Utricularia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Utricularia vulgaris subsp. minor can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine to treat conditions such as colds, fever, and respiratory problems.
